emojis.title: Total Lockdown!
emojis.description: Monk mode activated. No restricted apps allowed today.

emojis.title: Laser Focus
emojis.description: Amazing! You are taking back control of your day.

emojis.title: Healthy Balance
emojis.description: A reasonable limit. Good job setting boundaries.

emojis.title: Slipping Away...
emojis.description: Careful, you're dedicating a large chunk of your day to screen time.

emojis.title: Doomscroller Mode
emojis.description: Are you sure? This limit defeats the purpose of the blocker!
